scope: single training seed and one new K=8 dev pilot after PERSISTENT_HISTORY_CALL_CONFIRMED; no stress, formal validation, test, or multi-seed expansion
checkpoint_selection: none; fixed final step 600 is the only K=8 candidate

attention.query_key_input: action-only PFC state concatenated with the causal cyclic relation token
attention.history_value: the model's own previously emitted context at proposal tokens j<t

trainable_scope: history_query, history_key, context_choice_norm, and context_choice_head only; all pretrained PFC, EC, place, context head, content HPC, fusion, and decoder parameters frozen
loss: one unweighted all-token sensory cross-entropy only
causal_contract: context for prediction t reads actions through t and PFC event tokens j<t; x_t is revealed only after prediction and then enters the existing content-HPC write
post_result_rule: all five K=8 gates must pass before any three-seed training; otherwise stop and report the learned choice dynamics without tuning on seed 8928
